name: instant-api — resource pause/resume + deploy lifecycle
description: Resource pause/resume (migration 027) and deploy lifecycle events. Sources: audit_log records with audit_kind IN ('resource.paused', 'resource.resumed', 'deploy.created', 'deploy.healthy', 'deploy.failed') and the existing `deploy_status` Log fields. Pairs with paused-resource-stale, deploy-failure-rate, and deploy-time-degraded alerts.

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT filter(uniqueCount(resource_id), WHERE audit_kind = 'resource.paused') - filter(uniqueCount(resource_id), WHERE audit_kind = 'resource.resumed') AS 'paused active' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind IN ('resource.paused', 'resource.resumed') TIMESERIES 1 hour SINCE 30 days ago
SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind IN ('resource.paused', 'resource.resumed') FACET resource_type, audit_kind SINCE 7 days ago LIMIT 30

SELECT (filter(uniqueCount(deploy_id), WHERE audit_kind = 'deploy.healthy') / filter(uniqueCount(deploy_id), WHERE audit_kind = 'deploy.created')) * 100 AS 'success %' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind IN ('deploy.created', 'deploy.healthy') SINCE 24 hours ago

SELECT percentile(time_to_healthy_seconds, 50) AS 'p50 s', percentile(time_to_healthy_seconds, 95) AS 'p95 s' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind = 'deploy.healthy' AND time_to_healthy_seconds IS NOT NULL TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 7 days ago
SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind IN ('deploy.created', 'deploy.healthy', 'deploy.failed') FACET audit_kind TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 24 hours ago
